headline: Block (SQ) Stock Weighs Rebound Against High P/E And Intrinsic Value Estimates
summary: If you are wondering whether Block is attractively priced or already reflecting its potential, the recent share performance gives you a starting clue, but not the full story. Block closed at US$74.78, with returns of 8.2% over the last week, 8.1% over the last month, 14.8% year to date, 18.5% over one year, 16.6% over three years, and a decline of 69.4% over five years. Recent headlines around Block have focused on how the stock has been rebuilding after earlier weakness, with investors...

headline: Block (XYZ) Stock Could Be 23% Below Fair Value After Square Client Wins
summary: Recent client wins are putting Block (XYZ) back in focus for investors, as Sofive Soccer Centers and Coffee Dose adopt Square’s unified commerce platform to run complex, multi-location operations across sports facilities and quick-service restaurant formats. See our latest analysis for Block. These new multi-location clients arrive at a time when Block’s recent momentum has been strong, with a 90-day share price return of 25.96% and a 1-year total shareholder return of 18.53%.
